scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @passdeck/shared && npm run clean -w @passdeck/desktop
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @passdeck/shared && npm run dev -w @passdeck/desktop
scripts.lint: npm run build -w @passdeck/shared && npm run lint -w @passdeck/shared && npm run lint -w @passdeck/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @passdeck/shared && npm run typecheck -w @passdeck/shared && npm run typecheck -w @passdeck/desktop
scripts.test: npm run build -w @passdeck/shared && npm run test -w @passdeck/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build -w @passdeck/shared && npm run build -w @passdeck/desktop
scripts.package:mac: npm run build -w @passdeck/shared && npm run package:mac -w @passdeck/desktop
